Part.Source:
&HojeData = serverdate() &DataHoraImpressao = 'DATA E HORA IMPRESSÃO: ' + trim(&HojeData.ToFormattedString()) + ' ' + ServerTime()
MB 4 MT 2
for Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod
&FilDanCan = FilDanCan &FilNfeCab = '' if CteProTer <> Nota_proPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS &FilNfeCab = FilNfeCab Do Case Case FilNfeCab = '1' //DADOS FILIAL &FilImg146_50 = FilImg_LogNFeCmp
Case FilNfeCab = '2' //LOGOMARCA &FilImg146_50 = FilImg_LogNFeCmp
Case FilNfeCab = '3' //LOGO PARTE ESQUERDA &FilImg146_50 = FilImg_LogNfeEsq
Case FilNfeCab = '4' //LOGO PARTE SUPERIOR &FilImg146_50 = FilImg_LogNfeSup EndCase
If not FilEml.IsEmpty() &FilEml = FilEml If not FilCpj.IsEmpty() &DoisFilEml = 'CNPJ: '+FilCpj.Trim() +' IE:'+FilInsEst.Trim() If not FilFonNum.IsEmpty() &DoisFilEml += ' FONE: ' + FormataFONE.Udp(FilFonNum) EndIF EndIf Else If not FilCpj.IsEmpty() &FilEml = 'CNPJ: '+FilCpj.Trim() +' IE:'+FilInsEst.Trim() If not FilFonNum.IsEmpty() &DoisFilEml = ' FONE: ' + FormataFONE.Udp(FilFonNum) EndIF EndIf EndIF Endif
LeituraXmlDacteOS.Call(CteArqXml,&sdtXmlcte)
If not &sdtXmlcte.protCTe.infProt.nProt.IsEmpty() &Protocolo = &sdtXmlcte.protCTe.infProt.nProt + ' ' + Substr(&sdtXmlcte.protCTe.infProt.dhRecbto, 9,2) + '/' + Substr(&sdtXmlcte.protCTe.infProt.dhRecbto, 6,2) + '/' + Substr(&sdtXmlcte.protCTe.infProt.dhRecbto, 1,4) + ' ' + Substr(&sdtXmlcte.protCTe.infProt.dhRecbto, 12,8) EndiF
Do Case Case CteSts = Status_NFe.Cancelada print Cancelada noSkip
Case CteSts <> Status_NFe.Autorizada or &sdtXmlcte.protCTe.infProt.nProt.IsEmpty() &Protocolo = 'SEM VALOR FISCAL' print SemValorFiscal noSkip Case CteSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada if &sdtXmlcte.infCte.toma.xNome = 'CT-E EMITIDO EM AMBIENTE DE HOMOLOGACAO - SEM VALOR FISCAL' print SemValorFiscal noSkip EndIf EndCase Exit EndFor
if not &sdtXmlcte.protCTe.infProt.chCTe.IsEmpty() //################### CODIGO BARRAS ############################################################################################################### &TipoCodigoBarras = TipoCodigoBarras.Code128C RetornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &sdtConfiguracoesPasta) &Arquivo = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis + trim(&TipoCodigoBarras.ToString()) + &sdtXmlcte.protCTe.infProt.chCTe.Trim() + '.jpg'
&File.Source = &Arquivo If not &File.Exists() ExeCodigoBarrasWinWeb_qrCode.Call(&sdtConfiguracoesPasta, &TipoCodigoBarras, trim(&sdtXmlcte.protCTe.infProt.chCTe), trim(&sdtXmlcte.protCTe.infProt.chCTe)) EndIF
If &File.Exists() &ImgCodigoBarras.FromURL(&Arquivo) EndIF If serverDate() >= ctoD('07/10/2019') //################### QRCODE ############################################################################################################### &TipoCodigoBarras = TipoCodigoBarras.QrCode RetornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &sdtConfiguracoesPasta) &Arquivo = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis + trim(&TipoCodigoBarras) + &sdtXmlcte.protCTe.infProt.chCTe.Trim() + '.png' &valqrCode = &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.qrcode.Trim() //&valqrCode = 'http://www.dfeportal.fazenda.pr.gov.br/dfe-portal/rest/servico/consultaNFCe?chNFe=41160509428476000100650010000000041000000041&nVersao=100&tpAmb=2 &File.Source = &Arquivo If not &File.Exists() and not &valqrCode.IsEmpty() ExeCodigoBarrasWinWeb_qrCode.Call(&sdtConfiguracoesPasta, &TipoCodigoBarras, &sdtXmlcte.protCTe.infProt.chCTe.Trim(), &valqrCode) EndIF
&File.Source = &Arquivo If &File.Exists() &QrCode.FromURL(&Arquivo) EndIF EndIf EndIF
&Mensagem = 'Recebemos de ' + trim(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.xNome) + ' os volumes deste conhecimento de transporte em perfeito estado pelo que dou por cumprido o presente contrato de transporte.'
&recebemosDe = '' &recebemosDe1 = '' &TotLin = GxMlines(&Mensagem, 106) &NumLin = 1 Do While &NumLin <= &TotLin If &recebemosDe.IsEmpty() &recebemosDe = GxGetMLi(&Mensagem, &NumLin, 106) else &recebemosDe1 = GxGetMLi(&Mensagem, &NumLin, 106) Exit EndIF
&linhas += 1 &NumLin += 1 EndDo
//&XmlWriter.Open('novoTeste.xml') //&XmlWriter.WriteRawText(&sdtXmlcte.ToXml()) //&XmlWriter.Close()
&Pagina = '1' //TEM Q IMPRIMIR QTD PAGINAS
&Varchar = padL(trim(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.nCT), 9, '0') &Numero = substr(&Varchar, 1, 3) +'.' + substr(&Varchar, 4, 3) + '.' + substr(&Varchar, 7, 3)
//DADOS DA CTE &Varchar = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.Id) &CTeChv = substr(&Varchar,1,4) + '.'+ substr(&Varchar,5,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,9,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,13,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,17,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,21,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,25,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,29,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,33,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,37,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,41,4)
&Serie = padL(trim(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.serie), 3,'0') &CteModCod = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.mod Do Case Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.tpCTe = '0' &CteFin = 'Normal' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.tpCTe = '1' &CteFin = 'Complemento de Valores' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.tpCTe = '2' &CteFin = 'Anulação' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.tpCTe = '3' &CteFin = 'Substituição' EndCase
&CteNatOpe = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.CFOP + ' - '+&sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.natOp &InicioPrestacao = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.xMunIni.Trim()+'-'+&sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.UFIni +' - '+&sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.cMunIni &FinalPrestacao = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.xMunFim.Trim()+'-'+&sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.UFFim +' - '+&sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.cMunFim &dhEmi = substr(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.dhEmi ,9,2) +'/'+ Substr(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.dhEmi,6,2) +'/'+ Substr(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.dhEmi,1,4) &CteDtaEms = CtoD(&dhEmi) &CteHorEms = substr(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.dhEmi,12,8) &indGlobalizado = val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.indGlobalizado)
Do case Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.tpServ = '0' &tpServ = 'Normal' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.tpServ = '1' &tpServ = 'SubContratação' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.tpServ = '2' &tpServ = 'Redespacho' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.tpServ = '3' &tpServ = 'Redespacho Intermediário' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.tpServ = '4' &tpServ = 'Multimodal' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.tpServ = '6' &tpServ = 'Transporte de Pessoas' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.tpServ = '7' &tpServ = 'Transporte de Valores' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.tpServ = '8' &tpServ = 'Excesso de Bagagem' EndCase
Do case Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.modal = '01' &auxCteMod = 'Rodoviário' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.ide.modal = '02' &auxCteMod = 'Aéreo' EndCase
If (&sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.RodoOS.infFretamento.tpFretamento = '2') &TpFretamento = 'Continuo' Else &TpFretamento = 'Eventual' EndIf
//DADOS TOMADOR
&TomSer = 'Toamdor' &TomadorNome = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.toma.xNome.Trim() &TomadorEnd = 'ENDEREÇO: '+&sdtXmlcte.infCte.toma.enderToma.xLgr.Trim()+' - '+&sdtXmlcte.infCte.toma.enderToma.nro.Trim()+' - '+&sdtXmlcte.infCte.toma.enderToma.xBairro.Trim() &TomadorCpl = 'COMPL.: '+&sdtXmlcte.infCte.toma.enderToma.xCpl.Trim() &TomadorMuni = 'MUNICÍPIO: '+&sdtXmlcte.infCte.toma.enderToma.xMun.Trim()+' - '+&sdtXmlcte.infCte.toma.enderToma.UF &TomadorCep = 'CEP: '+FormataCEP.Udp(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.toma.enderToma.CEP) If &sdtXmlcte.infCte.toma.CNPJ.Trim().IsEmpty() &TomadorCNPJ = 'CPF: '+ &sdtXmlcte.infCte.toma.CPF Else &TomadorCNPJ = 'CNPJ: '+&sdtXmlcte.infCte.toma.CNPJ EndIf &TomadorIE = 'IE: '+ &sdtXmlcte.infCte.toma.IE &TomFONE = 'FONE: '+FormataFONE.Udp(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.toma.fone)
//DADOS EMITENTE &CteFilcpfCnpj = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.CPF
If &CteFilcpfCnpj.IsEmpty() &CteFilcpfCnpj = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.CNPJ EndIF ValidaCpfCnpj.call(&CteFilcpfCnpj, &Valida, 'N')
Header &Pagina = trim(str(&Page)) //TEM Q IMPRIMIR QTD PAGINAS End
If &FilDanCan = '1' print Assinatura print Recorte EndIF
&QtdLinhas = GxMlines(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.xNome, 35) If &QtdLinhas > 1 &UmFilRaz = GxGetMLi(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.xNome, 1, 30) &FiLRaz = GxGetMLi(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.xNome, 2, 30) Else &UmFilRaz = '' &FiLRaz = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.xNome EndIF
&FiLCidNom = formataCEP.Udp(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.CEP) + ' ' + &sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.xMun.Trim() + ' - ' + &sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.UF.Trim() &FilLog = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.xLgr.Trim() + ', ' + &sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.nro.Trim() If not &sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.xBairro.IsEmpty() &FilLog += ' - ' + &sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.xBairro.Trim() If not &sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.xCpl.Trim().IsEmpty() &FilLog += ' - ' + &sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.xCpl.Trim() EndIf EndIF &FilInsEst = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.emit.IE
do 'Emitente'
//######################################################################### //tomador Print Tomador
//SERVIÇOS E QTDE Print Servicos &CteSerDes = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infServico.xDescServ &CteCarQtdvar = RETIRAZerosDepoisVirgula.Udp(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infServico.InfQ.qCarga) Print ServicoItem
//################################################################################ //COMPONENTES &CteVlrRecSer = val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.vPrest.vRec) &CteVlrTotPreSer = val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.vPrest.vTPrest) Print Componentes &nome1 = '' &nome2 = '' &nome3 = '' &nome4 = '' &nome5 = '' &nome6 = '' &Valor1 = '' &Valor2 = '' &Valor3 = '' &Valor4 = '' &Valor5 = '' &Valor6 = '' For &sdtXmlcteComp in &sdtXmlcte.infCte.vPrest.Compp
Do Case Case &nome1.Trim().IsEmpty() &nome1 = &sdtXmlcteComp.xNome &Valor1 = &sdtXmlcteComp.vComp case &nome2.Trim().IsEmpty() &nome2 = &sdtXmlcteComp.xNome &Valor2 = &sdtXmlcteComp.vComp Case &nome3.Trim().IsEmpty() &nome3 = &sdtXmlcteComp.xNome &Valor3 = &sdtXmlcteComp.vComp Case &nome4.Trim().IsEmpty() &nome4 = &sdtXmlcteComp.xNome &Valor4 = &sdtXmlcteComp.vComp Case &nome5.Trim().IsEmpty() &nome5 = &sdtXmlcteComp.xNome &Valor5 =&sdtXmlcteComp.vComp Case &nome6.Trim().IsEmpty() &nome6 = &sdtXmlcteComp.xNome &Valor6 = &sdtXmlcteComp.vComp EndCase
EndFor Print ComponentesA
//################################################################################ //DADOS IMPOSTOS Print dadosImpostoAprox
Do Case Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMSSN.indSN = '1' &VarCteImpCst = '01 - Simples Nacional' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS45.CST = '40' &VarCteImpCst = '40 - ICMS isenção' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS45.CST = '41' &VarCteImpCst = '41 - ICMS não tributada' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS45.CST = '51' &VarCteImpCst = '51 - ICMS diferido' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS00.CST = '00' &VarCteImpCst = '00 - Tributação normal ICMS' &CteImpAli = Val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS00.pICMS) //aliquota &CteImpVbc = Val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS00.vBC) // base cal &CteImpVlr = Val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS00.vICMS) // valor icms Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS20.CST = '20' &VarCteImpCst = '20 - Tributação com BC reduzida do ICMS' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS90.CST = '90' &VarCteImpCst = '90 - ICMS outros' &CteImpAli = Val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS90.pICMS) //aliquota &CteImpVbc = Val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS90.vBC) // base cal &CteImpVlr = Val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS90.vICMS) // valor icms &CteImpPerRed = Val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS90.pRedBC) // % reducao &CteImpVlrCre = Val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS90.vCred) // valor crédito Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS60.CST = '60' &VarCteImpCst = '60 - ICMS cobrado ant. por ST tributária' &CteImpVbc = val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS60.vBCSTRet) &CteImpAli = val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS60.pICMSSTRet) &CteImpVstRet = val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS60.vICMSSTRet) &CteImpVlrCre = Val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS60.vCred) EndCase
Print DadosImp
//################################## SEGURADORA Do case
Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.seg.respSeg = '0' &CteSegRsp = 'REMETENTE' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.seg.respSeg = '1' &CteSegRsp = 'EXPEDIDOR' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.seg.respSeg = '2' &CteSegRsp = 'RECEBEDOR' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.seg.respSeg = '3' &CteSegRsp = 'DESTINATÁRIO' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.seg.respSeg = '4' &CteSegRsp = 'EMITENTE' Case &sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.seg.respSeg = '5' &CteSegRsp = 'TOMADOR' EndCase
&CteSegNom = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.seg.xSeg &CteSegApl = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.seg.nApol &CteSegAbr = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.seg.nAver &CteSeqVlrCar = val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.seg.vCarga)
&CteImpTriVlrPis = Val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.InfTribFed.vPIS) &CteImpTriVlrInss = Val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.InfTribFed.vINSS) &CteImpTriVlrCofins = Val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.InfTribFed.vCOFINS) &CteImpTriVlrIr = Val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.InfTribFed.viR) &CteImpTriVlrCsll = Val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.imp.InfTribFed.vCSLL)
Print Quantidades
//################################################################################ //OBSERVAÇÃO &auxCteObsGer = '' &aux2CteObsGer = '' &CteObsGer = GxGetMLi(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.compl.xObs, 1, 135) &auxCteObsGer = GxGetMLi(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.compl.xObs, 2, 135) &aux2CteObsGer = GxGetMLi(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.compl.xObs, 3, 135) Print Observacao
//################################################################################ ////MODAL RODOVIARIO //&dhPrv = substr(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodo.dPrev ,9,2) +'/'+ Substr(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodo.dPrev,6,2) +'/'+ Substr(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodo.dPrev,1,4) //&CteModRodDtaPrv = Ctod(&dhPrv) //If &sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodo.lota = '1' // &SimNao = 'Sim' //Else // &SimNao = 'Não' //EndIf
//&CteModRodRNTRC = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodo.RNTRC //&CteModRodCiot = val(&sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodo.CIOT)
For &sdtXmlcteObsCont in &sdtXmlcte.infCte.compl.ObsContt If &sdtXmlcteObsCont.xCampo = 'CPF MOTORISTA' &Mot1CPF = &sdtXmlcteObsCont.xTexto EndIf If &sdtXmlcteObsCont.xCampo = 'NOME MOTORISTA' &Aux1Nome = &sdtXmlcteObsCont.xTexto EndIf EndFor
&Aux1placa = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.RodoOS.veic.placa
if not &sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.RodoOS.NroRegEstadual.Trim().IsEmpty() &CteModRodNroRegEst = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.RodoOS.NroRegEstadual Else &CteModRodTaf = &sdtXmlcte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.RodoOS.TAF EndIf
If &sdtXmlcte.infCte.versao = '2.00' Print ModalRodoviario_200 Else Print ModalRodoviario EndIf
Do 'Adicionais' print INF_ADICIONAIS
If &FilDanCan = '2' //Imprimir na Parte Inferior da DANFE print Rodape
print Recorte print Assinatura else eject EndIF
Footer if &Page <> 1 or (&Page = 1 and &FilDanCan = '1') print Rodape EndIf End
sub 'Emitente'
Do Case
Case &FilNfeCab = '2' //LOGOMARCA print Emitente NoSkip print logoMarca
Case &FilNfeCab = '3' //LOGO PARTE ESQUERDA print Emitente NoSkip print logoEsquerda
Case &FilNfeCab = '4' //LOGO PARTE SUPERIOR print Emitente NoSkip print logoSuperior
Otherwise print Emitente NoSkip print DadosFilial EndCase
EndSub
Sub 'Adicionais' // &NfeDadAdi = GxGetMLi(&CteObsGer, 1, 85) // &NfeDadAdiUm = GxGetMLi(&CteObsGer, 2, 85) // &NfeDadAdiDois = GxGetMLi(&CteObsGer, 3, 85) // &NfeDadAditres = GxGetMLi(&CteObsGer, 4, 85) EndSub

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Consulta de autenticidade no portal nacional do CT-e www.cte.fazenda.gov.br/portal

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Documento Auxiliar do Conhecimento de Transporte Eletrônico

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: COMPONENTES DO VALOR DA PRESTAÇÃO DE SERVIÇO

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: SIGLA OU COD. INT DA FILIAL/PORTO/ESTAÇÃO/AEROPORTO DE ORIGEM

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: SIGLA OU COD. INT DA FILIAL/PORTO/ESTAÇÃO/AEROPORTO DE ORIGEM

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: SIGLA OU COD. INT DA FILIAL/PORTO/ESTAÇÃO/AEROPORTO DE ORIGEM

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: ESTE CONHECIMENTO DE TRANSPORTE ATENDE A LEGISLAÇÃO DE TRANSPORTE RODOVIÁRIO EM VIGOR.

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: DADOS ADICIONAIS - USO EXCLUSIVO DO EMISSOR DO CT-E

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Modal Rodoviario Data Prevista de entrega

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Valor da Carga para efeito de averbação
